steps.title: Multiply both sides by m to clear the denominator
steps.content:
Starting with the given formula:
$$v^2 = \frac{LT}{m}$$
Multiply both sides by $m$ to eliminate the denominator:
$$m v^2 = LT$$

steps.title: Divide both sides by L to isolate T
steps.content:
Divide both sides of $m v^2 = LT$ by $L$:
$$T = \frac{m v^2}{L}$$
A is correct.
